$schema_note: Model artefact registry. Each entry is one downloadable artefact. fetch-model reads this file, picks the matching name+variant (and optionally gpu_class for engine variants), downloads from `url`, verifies sha256, places under the user's cache dir. SHA-256 mismatch deletes the partial file and exits non-zero. UPDATE this manifest in the same PR that tags a release that ships the artefact — the URL in `url` should resolve as soon as the manifest is on main.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: Default. Cost/perf sweet spot for the realesrgan-x4plus model.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: Higher precision baseline; slower on most GPUs.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: Pre-compiled TensorRT engine produced by build/remote_build.py on a RunPod RTX 4090. Skips the ~30s engine-build cost on first request when the consumer GPU matches. Falls back to .onnx + JIT compile if engine isn't available for the host's GPU.
